name: Foiled Fish on the Grill
recipeInstructions:
1. Use heavy aluminum foil cut into large squares.
2. Place equal portions of the fish fillets on each piece of foil.
3. In a saucepan, melt margarine. Add lemon juice, parsley, dill, salt, and pepper. Stir to blend well.
4. Pour the mixture over the fish and sprinkle with paprika and onion slices (separated into rings).
5. Fold the foil around the mixture and seal using a drugstore fold or other method of sealing tightly. Leave a little space for the food to expand while cooking.
6. Place on hot grill and cook for 5-7 minutes per side. Fish should flake easily when done.
